## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix/...` branch)
- [ ] New feature (`feature/...` branch)
- [ ] Docs / chore / refactor / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows the naming convention (`feature/...`, `fix/...`, etc.)
- [ ] `ruff check src scripts` passes locally
- [ ] `black src scripts` has been run
- [ ] `mypy` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or personal meeting content in the diff
